# Brian Sparker

> Product leader with 10+ years building teams and scaling consumer apps at the intersection of product, growth, and emerging technology. Former You.com product manager focused on AI, search, and developer platforms. MBA from Boston University Questrom School of Business.

Brian Sparker operates in complex, cross-functional environments — partnering with engineering, design, sales, marketing, and leadership to turn fuzzy ideas into concrete systems that ship and scale. Recurring themes in his work include distribution, pricing, packaging, and how AI products should be priced, constrained, and explained so users trust them. He is deeply hands-on: prototyping, writing PRDs, pressure-testing assumptions, and building lightweight tools to validate ideas quickly.

## Site

- [Personal site (sparker.co)](https://sparker.co/): Single-page portfolio covering bio, selected work, and contact links.

## Work

- [AI Search Engine — You.com](https://you.com/): Led the product shift from search results to conversational AI, growing from 1M to 10M monthly users.
- [Ecommerce Search Platform — Crate & Barrel](https://www.crateandbarrel.com/): Rebuilt enterprise search, delivering 7-figure ROI in the first 30 days through unified product data and consistent discovery.
- [Search & Discovery Marketplace — G2](https://www.g2.com/): Owned G2's buyer search roadmap, improving ranking, personalization, and LLM-powered guidance to increase engagement 145% YoY.
- [LabelMerge — Open Source Mail Merge](https://sparker.co/free-mail-merge/): Free, privacy-first mail merge tool that runs entirely in-browser, eliminating data exposure and access requirements for Google Sheets users.
- [PromptLens — Open Source LLM Evaluation Suite](https://github.com/brainsparker/PromptLens): Evaluation framework for testing and optimizing LLM prompts, providing systematic analysis tools to measure response quality and improve AI application performance.
- [you.md — Open Standard for AI Preferences](https://github.com/brainsparker/you.md): Parser library and CLI tool implementing a portable format for AI assistant preferences, enabling consistent coding style and context across AI-assisted development platforms.
- [Bold-Claim — Open Source Positioning Skill](https://github.com/brainsparker/Bold-Claim): Claude skill that researches competitive landscapes and surfaces the single contested sentence driving a product's GTM motion, scoring claim candidates against a 25-point sharpness rubric.
- [frugal.sh — Open Source AI Cost Optimizer](https://frugal.sh): AI toolchain router that dispatches each task to the cheapest reliable path across local models, hosted models, search, and browser tools — shipped as a single signed Go binary with CLI and MCP server.

## Connect

- [GitHub](https://github.com/brainsparker): Open source projects and experiments.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bsparker/): Professional background and current role.
